scripts.dev: npm run build -w @ald/domain && npm run build -w @ald/database && concurrently -n API,WEB -c auto "npm run dev -w @ald/api" "npm run dev -w @ald/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ald/domain && npm run build -w @ald/database && npm run build -w @ald/api && npm run build -w @ald/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @ald/domain && npm run build -w @ald/database && npm run test -w @ald/domain && npm run test -w @ald/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @ald/domain && npm run build -w @ald/database && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
